title: Democrat Taylor Rehmet Wins Deep-Red Texas State Senate Seat In Landslide, Major Upset
description: Democrat Taylor Rehmet defeated a Trump-endorsed Republican in a Saturday election for a Texas State Senate seat the president won by double digits three times.
content: Democratic Texas Senate candidate Taylor Rehmet defeated Trump-endorsed Republican Leigh Wambsganss in a Saturday special election for a seat the president won by double digits three times, multiple … [+3090 chars]
de: Der Demokrat Taylor Rehmet gewinnt den tiefroten Senatssitz des US-Bundesstaates Texas mit Erdrutsch und großer Überraschung. Der Demokrat Taylor Rehmet besiegte am Samstag einen von Trump unterstützten Republikaner bei der Wahl um einen Sitz im Senat des US-Bundesstaates Texas, den der Präsident dreimal zweistellig gewann.
en: Democrat Taylor Rehmet Wins Deep-Red Texas State Senate Seat In Landslide, Major Upset. Democrat Taylor Rehmet defeated a Trump-endorsed Republican in a Saturday election for a Texas State Senate seat the president won by double digits three times.
la: Democrata Taylor Rehmet in Senatu Publico Texas Rehmet Deep-Red-red vincit Sedes in Landslide, Major Upset. Democrata Taylor Rehmet Trump-consensum Republican vicit in comitiis Sabbati ad senatum rei publicae Texas in sede praesidentis duobus digitis ter parta.
